{{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. Mentors have to sign up using this special formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please strictly use this syntax, DO NOT add any links or wikitext in the description; otherwise it will break. Please limit your description to 240 characters. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Aseleste]]| * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. Although I'm active in contributing to video game articles, I've learned the ropes and am here to answer your questions. If you have any, please ask! * [[User:Ampimd]]|Hello, I edit a wide variety of articles and topics, I hope I can lend a helping hand to you. Enjoy! * [[User:Tol]]|Welcome! I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. Ask me if you have any questions! * [[User:Pelagic]]|Hi, my interests include biology, old books, food, open data, photography, and of course Wikimedia ... but you can ask me anything! * [[User:Calliopejen1]]|Hi! I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Usedtobecool]]|I have some experience helping out new editors, and will happily assist anyone here to build a free encyclopedia. I may decline requests from those who want to make money or promote something. * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I was a newcomer once and I know how much new information there is at first, but I can help you find a place to start. * [[User:Elli]]|Hi! I'm a somewhat experienced editor happy to work with people interested in editing here. * [[User:Isabelle Belato]]|Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! My name is Isabelle and I'm glad to see you are interested in helping with the project. If you have any questions, feel free to ask! * [[User:DanCherek]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I like editing articles about literature and music, but feel free to ask me about anything — I'd love to help you get started. * [[User:ARoseWolf]]|Hello and welcome! My name is Asareel and I am here to assist you with navigating and editing Wikipedia. Please do not hesitate to ask me any questions you may have. * [[User:GenQuest]]|I can copyedit your new article(s) and creation(s) in such a way that you learn to avoid the pitfalls many new users face while beginning to edit here. * [[User:Michael D. Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. Although I'm active in contributing to video game articles, I've learned the ropes and am here to answer your questions. If you have any, please ask! * [[User:Ampimd]]|Hello, I edit a wide variety of articles and topics, I hope I can lend a helping hand to you. Enjoy! * [[User:Tol]]|Welcome! I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. Ask me if you have any questions! * [[User:Pelagic]]|Hi, my interests include biology, old books, food, open data, photography, and of course Wikimedia ... but you can ask me anything! * [[User:Calliopejen1]]|Hi! I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I was a newcomer once and I know how much new information there is at first, but I can help you find a place to start. * [[User:Elli]]|Hi! I'm a somewhat experienced editor happy to work with people interested in editing here. * [[User:Isabelle Belato]]|Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! My name is Isabelle and I'm glad to see you are interested in helping with the project. If you have any questions, feel free to ask! * [[User:DanCherek]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I like editing articles about literature and music, but feel free to ask me about anything — I'd love to help you get started. * [[User:ARoseWolf]]|Hello and welcome! My name is Asareel and I am here to assist you with navigating and editing Wikipedia. Please do not hesitate to ask me any questions you may have. * [[User:GenQuest]]|I can copyedit your new article(s) and creation(s) in such a way that you learn to avoid the pitfalls many new users face while beginning to edit here. * [[User:Michael D. Turnbull]]|I mainly contribute to science-related topics but I'll try to help you with other questions, including use of Wikimedia Commons for uploading images. * [[User:Eddie891]]|Hi! I'm Eddie891. I'm involved with a number of editing projects here. I like to go where my interest takes me and am happy to answer any questions you may have! * [[User:Pyrrho the Skeptic]]| Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! I have a wide variety of interests, and want to help editors have confidence and knowledge in their journey. Ask me literally anything, anytime! * [[User:Qwerfjkl]]|Hi, I'm Qwerfjkl! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:CaptainEek]]|Howdy hello! I'm CaptainEek and I sail the high seas of Wikipedia looking for users to help! Feel free to leave a message in a bottle for me, and welcome aboard matey. * [[User:Dreamy Jazz]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Dreamy Jazz, though please feel free to call me Jazz or DJ. If you want to ask me a question do leave a message and I'll get back to you soon. I live in the UTC timezone, so it may be a few hours before I reply. * [[User:Oronsay]]|G'day and welcome to Wikipedia! No editing question is too silly to ask me. I'm here to help you get started. * [[User:lajmmoore]]| Hi there, lovely to meet you, and looking forward to supporting your edits! * [[User:Asartea]]|Hi there, and welcome to Wikipedia. Feel free to ask me any questions. * [[User:Ezlev]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I love helping to improve this free source of information, and I'm so glad you want to help too. Ask me anything and I'll do my best to help! * [[User:Pahunkat]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Pahunkat, an editor here on Wikipedia. Please feel free to ask me any questions you have, and I'll try my best to help! * [[User:Vukky]]|Hi, and welcome to Wikipedia! I'm Vukky, and I've been a Wikipedia editor for a few years. Let me know if you have any questions :) * [[User:EpicPupper]]|Hi, I'm EpicPupper! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:Zoozaz1]]|Hi, I'm Zoozaz1! I'd be happy to answer any questions about Wikipedia you might have. * [[User:TheSandDoctor]]|Hi, I'm TheSandDoctor! I was as confused as you are now. But asking questions to experienced users helped me. Please feel free to ask me any question! * [[User:Pbsouthwood]]|I will help if I can, otherwise will try to point you to someone else who is more expert in whatever the problem may be. * [[User:SCHolar44]]|Hello! Thank you for joining our wonderful project. I'm a long-time editor and would be happy to make your journey easier and more rewarding. Let me know if I can help. I live in the UTC+10 time zone. Cheers, Simon. :-) * [[User:Sennecaster]]|Hello! I'm Sennecaster, but people call me Senne. Feel free to ask me questions and I will do my best to respond! I edit during the reasonable UTC-5 hours of the day. * [[User:Justiyaya]]|Hi, I'm Justiyaya! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:TheresNoTime]]|Welcome! All these pages were made by people just like you - there's a bit of a learning curve, so feel free to ask me anything :) * [[User:Chlod]]|Hiya! I'm Chlod, and I hope you enjoy your stay as a Wikipedia editor! Let me know if you have any questions or concerns, and I'll come running! * [[User:JavaHurricane]]|Hi there! Welcome to Wikipedia. I've been editing for a few years now, and will do my best to help you. * [[User:Rotideypoc41352]]|Hello and welcome! Please feel free to drop by my talk page, introduce yourself, and let me know what you led you to click that "Edit" button. * [[User:Extraordinary Writ]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! Do feel free to ask me any questions you might have about editing: I'd be glad to help. * [[User:Ganesha811]]|Hello and welcome to Wikipedia! I'm Ganesha811 - if you have any questions about Wikipedia and how to edit, just ask.

Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Although I'm active in contributing to video game articles, I've learned the ropes and am here to answer your questions. I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I'm a somewhat experienced editor happy to work with people interested in editing here. * [[User:DanCherek]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:CaptainEek]]|Howdy hello! I'm CaptainEek and I sail the high seas of Wikipedia looking for users to help! Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:CaptainEek]]|Howdy hello! I'm CaptainEek and I sail the high seas of Wikipedia looking for users to help! Maybe my advice will be useful sometimes. * [[User:FormalDude]]|I'm happy to help answer your questions! I edit Wikipedia daily and am quick at responding. * [[User:Nick Moyes]]|Hello! If you need any help or guidance as you get started here, just click the button below and ask me a question. I'm around most days. Cheers, Nick. * [[User:Cloud atlas]]|Hi! I've been editing Wikipedia for a few years, and I love to help new people get started. Feel free to ask questions! * [[User:Celestina007]]|Hello there, I’m delighted to guide and guard you throughout your Wikipedia career, Please do not hesitate to reach out to me. Happy editing! * [[User:Aerin17]]|Hello and welcome to Wikipedia! Feel free to ask me any questions you may have-- I'm always happy to help. * [[User:Gerald Waldo Luis]]|Heyy, welcome! :) If you're a newcomer-- which I used to be-- and you'd like to ask questions about editing or anything Wikipedia related, I'd be happy to help! Keep in mind my time zone is [[UTC+7]], although if you're lucky I sometimes stay up.

{{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. Mentors have to sign up using this special formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please strictly use this syntax, DO NOT add any links or wikitext in the description; otherwise it will break. Please limit your description to 240 characters. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. Although I'm active in contributing to video game articles, I've learned the ropes and am here to answer your questions. If you have any, please ask! * [[User:Ampimd]]|Hello, I edit a wide variety of articles and topics, I hope I can lend a helping hand to you. Enjoy! * [[User:Tol]]|Welcome! I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. Ask me if you have any questions! * [[User:Pelagic]]|Hi, my interests include biology, old books, food, open data, photography, and of course Wikimedia ... but you can ask me anything! * [[User:Calliopejen1]]|Hi! I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I was a newcomer once and I know how much new information there is at first, but I can help you find a place to start. * [[User:Elli]]|Hi! I'm a somewhat experienced editor happy to work with people interested in editing here. * [[User:Isabelle Belato]]|Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! My name is Isabelle and I'm glad to see you are interested in helping with the project. If you have any questions, feel free to ask! * [[User:DanCherek]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I like editing articles about literature and music, but feel free to ask me about anything — I'd love to help you get started. * [[User:ARoseWolf]]|Hello and welcome! My name is Asareel and I am here to assist you with navigating and editing Wikipedia. Please do not hesitate to ask me any questions you may have. * [[User:GenQuest]]|I can copyedit your new article(s) and creation(s) in such a way that you learn to avoid the pitfalls many new users face while beginning to edit here. * [[User:Michael D. Turnbull]]|I mainly contribute to science-related topics but I'll try to help you with other questions, including use of Wikimedia Commons for uploading images. * [[User:Eddie891]]|Hi! I'm Eddie891. I'm involved with a number of editing projects here. I like to go where my interest takes me and am happy to answer any questions you may have! * [[User:Pyrrho the Skeptic]]| Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! I have a wide variety of interests, and want to help editors have confidence and knowledge in their journey. Ask me literally anything, anytime! * [[User:Qwerfjkl]]|Hi, I'm Qwerfjkl! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:CaptainEek]]|Howdy hello! I'm CaptainEek and I sail the high seas of Wikipedia looking for users to help! Feel free to leave a message in a bottle for me, and welcome aboard matey. * [[User:Dreamy Jazz]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Dreamy Jazz, though please feel free to call me Jazz or DJ. If you want to ask me a question do leave a message and I'll get back to you soon. I live in the UTC timezone, so it may be a few hours before I reply. * [[User:lajmmoore]]| Hi there, lovely to meet you, and looking forward to supporting your edits! * [[User:Asartea]]|Hi there, and welcome to Wikipedia. Feel free to ask me any questions. * [[User:Ezlev]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I love helping to improve this free source of information, and I'm so glad you want to help too. Ask me anything and I'll do my best to help! * [[User:Pahunkat]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Pahunkat, an editor here on Wikipedia. Please feel free to ask me any questions you have, and I'll try my best to help! * [[User:Vukky]]|Hi, and welcome to Wikipedia! I'm Vukky, and I've been a Wikipedia editor for a few years. Let me know if you have any questions :) * [[User:EpicPupper]]|Hi, I'm EpicPupper! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:Zoozaz1]]|Hi, I'm Zoozaz1! I'd be happy to answer any questions about Wikipedia you might have. I'll try to reply within a day. * [[User:TheSandDoctor]]|Hi, I'm TheSandDoctor! I was as confused as you are now. But asking questions to experienced users helped me. Please feel free to ask me any question! * [[User:Pbsouthwood]]|I will help if I can, otherwise will try to point you to someone else who is more expert in whatever the problem may be. I am in UTC+2 time zone. My interests are mainly in science, technology and underwater diving. * [[User:SCHolar44]]|Hello! Thank you for joining our wonderful project. I'm a long-time editor and would be happy to make your journey easier and more rewarding. Let me know if I can help. I live in the UTC+10 time zone. Cheers, Simon. :-) * [[User:Sennecaster]]|Hello! I'm Sennecaster, but people call me Senne. Feel free to ask me questions and I will do my best to respond! I edit during the reasonable UTC-5 hours of the day. * [[User:Justiyaya]]|Hi, I'm Justiyaya! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:Chlod]]|Hiya! I'm Chlod, and I hope you enjoy your stay as a Wikipedia editor! Let me know if you have any questions or concerns, and I'll come running! * [[User:JavaHurricane]]|Hi there! Welcome to Wikipedia. I've been editing for a few years now, and will do my best to help you. * [[User:Rotideypoc41352]]|Hello and welcome! Please feel free to drop by my talk page, introduce yourself, and let me know what you led you to click that "Edit" button. * [[User:Extraordinary Writ]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! Do feel free to ask me any questions you might have about editing: I'd be glad to help. * [[User:Ganesha811]]|Hello and welcome to Wikipedia! I'm Ganesha811 - if you have any questions about Wikipedia and how to edit, just ask. * [[User:LEvalyn]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I've been editing for a few years and having a lot of fun, I am happy to answer questions or help however I can! * [[User:I dream of horses]]|Hello! I'm I dream of horses, and have been editing for over a decade! Ask me anything about Wikipedia. * [[User:Blaze Wolf]]|Hello! I'm here to help new users in understanding and editing Wikipedia constructively. * [[User:ZI Jony]]|Hello, Welcome to Wikipedia! I've been editing for a few years. Do feel free to ask me any questions you might have about editing, I am happy to answer your questions or help you however I can! * [[User:Usedtobecool]]|Hello, and welcome to Wikipedia! I am Usedtobecool and I have some experience guiding new editors. Please feel free to reach out if you are having trouble getting started or run into any problems. {{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. If you would like to be available to help new users, please add your name and a brief welcome message at the bottom of the page. '''Who can become a mentor? ''' If you are sufficiently experienced to answer basic editing questions from new users, and enjoy helping people in a friendly and supportive manner, then you are an ideal person to be a Mentor. '''How do I sign up?''' You need to be [[WP:XC|Extended Confirmed]] to edit this list. (It is also expected that a significant proportion of your 500 edits will have been made in Mainspace.) If you don't yet meet this essential requirement, please gain a bit more experience before adding yourself. Mentors should sign up with a short welcome message using the following formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please use only this syntax; DO NOT add any links or wikitext in your welcome message or it may affect how all the messages appear. Please limit it to 240 characters. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. '''What happens next?'''
Once you have signed up on this list you will start to be randomly assigned users as 'mentees'. Their names will appear in your new 'Mentor Dashboard' which you will find via a new link at the top of each page. You do not need to proactively welcome them - your invitation message simply invites them to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help from someone. You can change how mentees appear in youyr dashboard by means of the Filter control. '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?''' In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [[mw:Help:Growth/Tools/How To Claim A Mentee|'How To Claim A Mentee']]. {{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. If you would like to be available to help new users, please add your name and a brief welcome message at the bottom of the page. '''Who can become a mentor? ''' If you are sufficiently experienced to answer basic editing questions from new users, and enjoy helping people in a friendly and supportive manner, then you are an ideal person to be a Mentor. You need to be [[WP:XC|Extended Confirmed]] to edit this list at the present time. (It is also expected that a significant proportion of your 500 minimum edits will have been made in Mainspace.) If you don't yet meet this key requirement, please gain a bit more experience before adding yourself. '''How do I sign up?''' Mentors should sign up below with a short welcome message using the following formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please use only this syntax; DO NOT insert any links or wikitext in your welcome message or it may affect how all the messages appear. Please limit it to 240 characters. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. '''What happens next?'''
Once you have signed up here, you will start to be randomly assigned users as 'mentees'. Their names will appear in your new 'Mentor Dashboard' which you find via a new link at the top of every page. Equally, each new user (mentee) that is assigned to you will see ''your'' welcome message in a 'Your mentor' box on ''their'' own new 'Homepage' tab. You do not need to proactively welcome them - your invitation message simply invites them to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help from someone. You can change which mentees appear in your dashboard by means of the Filter control. (For further information see this [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/FAQ#mentoring Mediawiki FAQ]) '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?''' In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [[mw:Help:Growth/Tools/How To Claim A Mentee|'How To Claim A Mentee']]. Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can reach via a new link at the top of every page. Each new user (mentee) that is assigned to you will see ''your'' welcome message in a 'Your mentor' box on ''their'' own 'Homepage' tab. You do not need to proactively welcome them - your invitation message simply invites them to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help from someone. (For further information see this [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/FAQ#mentoring Mediawiki FAQ]) '''Will I be swamped with questions?''' This is unlikely to happen. Whilst you will see your Dashboard filling up with assigned usernames, by far the majority will make one edit or less. Of the remainder, most will be OK as they are. Of those needing help, some will find their way to the [[WP:TH|Teahouse]] or get solutions elsewhere. Only a small number will seek out your help as a mentor, and we hope you will be there for them when they do. If you set your Dashboard filter to only display users who have made ''one edit or more'' in the last ''day'' or ''week'', you will drastically reduce that list. As of early 2022, mentors have reported getting less than a dozen simple questions a month, and going a week or two without any at all. '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?''' In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Growth/Tools/How_to_claim_a_mentee 'How To Claim A Mentee']. '''Where can I leave feedback?''' You may leave comments about the Mentor list at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features/Mentor list]], or give broader feedback and suggestions at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features]]. Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. Although I'm active in contributing to video game articles, I've learned the ropes and am here to answer your questions. If you have any, please ask! * [[User:Ampimd]]|Hello, I edit a wide variety of articles and topics, I hope I can lend a helping hand to you. Enjoy! * [[User:Tol]]|Welcome! I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. Ask me if you have any questions! * [[User:Pelagic]]|Hi, my interests include biology, old books, food, open data, photography, and of course Wikimedia ... but you can ask me anything! * [[User:Calliopejen1]]|Hi! I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I was a newcomer once and I know how much new information there is at first, but I can help you find a place to start. * [[User:Elli]]|Hi! I'm a somewhat experienced editor happy to work with people interested in editing here. * [[User:Isabelle Belato]]|Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! My name is Isabelle and I'm glad to see you are interested in helping with the project. If you have any questions, feel free to ask! * [[User:DanCherek]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I like editing articles about literature and music, but feel free to ask me about anything — I'd love to help you get started. * [[User:ARoseWolf]]|Hello and welcome! My name is Asareel and I am here to assist you with navigating and editing Wikipedia. Please do not hesitate to ask me any questions you may have. * [[User:GenQuest]]|I can copyedit your new article(s) and creation(s) in such a way that you learn to avoid the pitfalls many new users face while beginning to edit here. * [[User:Michael D. Turnbull]]|I mainly contribute to science-related topics but I'll try to help you with other questions, including use of Wikimedia Commons for uploading images. * [[User:Eddie891]]|Hi! I'm Eddie891. Feel free to ask me any questions. * [[User:Ezlev]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I love helping to improve this free source of information, and I'm so glad you want to help too. main.*: {{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. If you would like to be available to help new users, please add your name and a brief welcome message at the bottom of the page. '''Who can become a mentor? ''' If you are sufficiently experienced to answer basic editing questions from new users, and enjoy helping people in a friendly and supportive manner, then you are an ideal person to be a Mentor. Thank you. You need to be [[WP:XC|Extended Confirmed]] to edit this list at the present time. (It is also expected that a significant proportion of your 500 minimum edits will have been made in Mainspace.) If you don't yet meet this key requirement, please gain a bit more experience before adding yourself. '''How do I sign up?''' Mentors should sign up below with a short welcome message using the following formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please use only this syntax; DO NOT insert any links or wikitext in your welcome message or it may affect how all the messages appear. Please limit it to 240 characters. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. '''What happens next?''' Once you have signed up here, you will start to be randomly assigned users as 'mentees'. Their names will begin to appear in your new 'Mentor dashboard'. You can reach it via a new link at the top of every page. Each new user (mentee) assigned to you will see ''your'' welcome message in a 'Your mentor' box on ''their'' own 'Homepage' tab. You '''do not''' need to proactively welcome them! - your invitation message simply invites ''them'' to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help. (For further information see this [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/FAQ#mentoring Mediawiki FAQ]) '''Will I be swamped with questions?''' This is unlikely to happen. Whilst you will see your Dashboard filling up with assigned usernames, by far the majority will make one edit or less. Of the remainder, most will be OK as they are. Of those needing help, some will find their way to the [[WP:TH|Teahouse]] or get solutions elsewhere. Only a small number will seek out your help as a mentor, and we hope you will be there for them when they do. If you set your Dashboard filter to only display users who've made ''one edit or more'' in the last ''day'' or ''week'', you will drastically reduce that list. As of early 2022, mentors have reported getting less than a dozen simple questions a month, and going a week or two without any at all. '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?''' In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Growth/Tools/How_to_claim_a_mentee 'How To Claim A Mentee']. '''Where can I leave feedback?''' You may leave comments about the Mentor list at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features/Mentor list]], or give broader feedback and suggestions at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features]]. Please note, if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. If you have any, please ask! * [[User:Ampimd]]|Hello, I edit a wide variety of articles and topics, I hope I can lend a helping hand to you. Enjoy! * [[User:Tol]]|Welcome! I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. Ask me if you have any questions! * [[User:Pelagic]]|Hi, my interests include biology, old books, food, open data, photography, and of course Wikimedia ... but you can ask me anything! * [[User:Calliopejen1]]|Hi! I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I was a newcomer once and I know how much new information there is at first, but I can help you find a place to start. * [[User:Elli]]|Hi! comment: Adding a note to show what format a Mentee question will take.

main.*:
{{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. If you would like to be available to help new users, please add your name and a brief welcome message at the bottom of the page. '''Who can become a mentor? '''
If you are sufficiently experienced to answer basic editing questions from new users, and enjoy helping people in a friendly and supportive manner, then you are an ideal person to be a Mentor. Thank you! You need to be [[WP:XC|Extended Confirmed]] to edit this list at the present time. (It is also expected that a significant proportion of your 500 minimum edits will have been made in Mainspace.) If you don't yet meet this key requirement, please gain a bit more experience before adding yourself. '''How do I sign up?'''
Mentors should sign up below with a short welcome message using the following formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please use only this syntax; DO NOT insert any links or wikitext in your welcome message or it may affect how all the messages appear. Please limit it to 240 characters. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. '''What happens next?'''
Once you have signed up here, you will start to be randomly assigned users as 'mentees'. Their names will begin to appear in your new 'Mentor dashboard'. You can reach it via a new link at the top of every page. Each new user (mentee) assigned to you will see ''your'' welcome message in a 'Your mentor' box on ''their'' own 'Homepage' tab. You '''do not''' need to proactively welcome your mentees! - your invitation message simply invites ''them'' to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help. Their post on your talk page will automatically begin "''Question from [username]''" and is tagged as a 'Mentorship module edit'. (For further information see this [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/FAQ#mentoring Mediawiki FAQ]) '''Will I be swamped with questions?'''
This is unlikely to happen. Whilst you'll certainly see your Dashboard filling up with newly assigned usernames, by far the majority will make one edit or less. Of the remainder, most will be OK as they are. Of those needing help, some will find their way to the [[WP:TH|Teahouse]] or get solutions elsewhere. Only a small number will seek your help as a mentor, and we hope you will be there for them when they do. Hint: set your Dashboard filter to only display users who've made ''one edit or more'' in the last ''day'' or ''week'', and you will drastically reduce that list. For a list of every question asked of all mentors over the last 14 days, [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&tagfilter=mentorship+module+question&limit=100&days=14&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 Click Here]. '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?'''
In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Growth/Tools/How_to_claim_a_mentee 'How To Claim A Mentee']. '''Where can I leave feedback?'''
You may leave comments about the Mentor list at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features/Mentor list]], or give broader feedback and suggestions at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features]]. Please note: if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. Although I'm active in contributing to video game articles, I've learned the ropes and am here to answer your questions. If you have any, please ask! * [[User:Ampimd]]|Hello, I edit a wide variety of articles and topics, I hope I can lend a helping hand to you. Enjoy! * [[User:Tol]]|Welcome! I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. Ask me if you have any questions! * [[User:Pelagic]]|Hi, my interests include biology, old books, food, open data, photography, and of course Wikimedia ... but you can ask me anything! * [[User:Calliopejen1]]|Hi! I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I was a newcomer once and I know how much new information there is at first, but I can help you find a place to start. * [[User:Elli]]|Hi! I'm a somewhat experienced editor happy to work with people interested in editing here. * [[User:Isabelle Belato]]|Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! My name is Isabelle and I'm glad to see you are interested in helping with the project. If you have any questions, feel free to ask! * [[User:DanCherek]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I like editing articles about literature and music, but feel free to ask me about anything — I'd love to help you get started. * [[User:ARoseWolf]]|Hello and welcome! My name is Asareel and I am here to assist you with navigating and editing Wikipedia. Please do not hesitate to ask me any questions you may have. * [[User:GenQuest]]|I can copyedit your new article(s) and creation(s) in such a way that you learn to avoid the pitfalls many new users face while beginning to edit here. * [[User:Michael D. Turnbull]]|I mainly contribute to science-related topics but I'll try to help you with other questions, including use of Wikimedia Commons for uploading images. * [[User:Eddie891]]|Hi! I'm Eddie891. I'm involved with a number of editing projects here. I like to go where my interest takes me and am happy to answer any questions you may have! * [[User:Pyrrho the Skeptic]]| Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! I have a wide variety of interests, and want to help editors have confidence and knowledge in their journey. Ask me literally anything, anytime! * [[User:Qwerfjkl]]|Hi, I'm Qwerfjkl! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:CaptainEek]]|Howdy hello! I'm CaptainEek and I sail the high seas of Wikipedia looking for users to help! Feel free to leave a message in a bottle for me, and welcome aboard matey. * [[User:Dreamy Jazz]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Dreamy Jazz, though please feel free to call me Jazz or DJ. If you want to ask me a question do leave a message and I'll get back to you soon. I live in the UTC timezone, so it may be a few hours before I reply. * [[User:lajmmoore]]| Hi there, lovely to meet you, and looking forward to supporting your edits! * [[User:Asartea]]|Hi there, and welcome to Wikipedia. Feel free to ask me any questions. * [[User:Ezlev]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I love helping to improve this free source of information, and I'm so glad you want to help too. Ask me anything and I'll do my best to help! * [[User:Pahunkat]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Pahunkat, an editor here on Wikipedia. Please feel free to ask me any questions you have, and I'll try my best to help! * [[User:Vukky]]|Hi, and welcome to Wikipedia! I'm Vukky, and I've been a Wikipedia editor for a few years. Let me know if you have any questions :) * [[User:EpicPupper]]|Hi, I'm EpicPupper! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:Zoozaz1]]|Hi, I'm Zoozaz1! I'd be happy to answer any questions about Wikipedia you might have. I'll try to reply within a day. * [[User:TheSandDoctor]]|Hi, I'm TheSandDoctor! I was as confused as you are now. But asking questions to experienced users helped me. Please feel free to ask me any question! * [[User:Pbsouthwood]]|I will help if I can, otherwise will try to point you to someone else who is more expert in whatever the problem may be. I am in UTC+2 time zone. My interests are mainly in science, technology and underwater diving. * [[User:SCHolar44]]|Hello! Thank you for joining our wonderful project. I'm a long-time editor and would be happy to make your journey easier and more rewarding. Let me know if I can help. I live in the UTC+10 time zone. Cheers, Simon. :-) * [[User:Sennecaster]]|Hello! I'm Sennecaster, but people call me Senne. Feel free to ask me questions and I will do my best to respond! I edit during the reasonable UTC-5 hours of the day. * [[User:Justiyaya]]|Hi, I'm Justiyaya! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:Chlod]]|Hiya! I'm Chlod, and I hope you enjoy your stay as a Wikipedia editor! {{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. If you would like to be available to help new users, please add your name and a brief welcome message at the bottom of the page. '''Who can become a mentor? '''
If you are sufficiently experienced to answer basic editing questions from new users, and enjoy helping people in a friendly and supportive manner, then you are an ideal person to be a Mentor. Thank you! You need to be [[WP:XC|Extended Confirmed]] to edit this list at the present time. (It is also expected that a significant proportion of your 500 minimum edits will have been made in Mainspace.) If you don't yet meet this key requirement, please gain a bit more experience before adding yourself. '''How do I sign up?'''
Mentors should sign up below with a short welcome message using the following formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please use only this syntax; DO NOT insert any links or wikitext in your welcome message or it may affect how all the messages appear. Please limit it to 240 characters Avoid mentioning your own subject interests in your welcome message, as you will available as a mentor to many different types of new users. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. '''What happens next?'''
Once you have signed up here, you will start to be randomly assigned users as 'mentees'. Their names will begin to appear in your new [[Special:MentorDashboard|'Mentor dashboard']]. You can reach it via a new link at the top of every page. Each new user (mentee) assigned to you will see ''your'' welcome message in a 'Your mentor' box on ''their'' own 'Homepage' tab. You '''do not''' need to proactively welcome your mentees! - your invitation message simply invites ''them'' to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help. Their post on your talk page will automatically begin "''Question from [username]''" and is tagged as a 'Mentorship module edit'. (For further information see this [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/FAQ#mentoring Mediawiki FAQ]) '''Will I be swamped with questions?'''
This is unlikely to happen. Whilst you'll certainly see your Dashboard filling up with newly assigned usernames, by far the majority will make one edit or less. Of the remainder, most will be OK as they are. Of those needing help, some will find their way to the [[WP:TH|Teahouse]] or get solutions elsewhere. Only a small number will seek your help as a mentor, and we hope you will be there for them when they do. Hint: set your Dashboard filter to only display users who've made ''one edit or more'' in the last ''day'' or ''week'', and you will drastically reduce that list. For a list of every question asked of all mentors over the last 14 days, [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&tagfilter=mentorship+module+question&limit=100&days=14&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 Click Here]. '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?'''
In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Growth/Tools/How_to_claim_a_mentee 'How To Claim A Mentee']. '''Where can I leave feedback?'''
You may leave comments about the Mentor list at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features/Mentor list]], or give broader feedback and suggestions at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features]]. Please note: if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. Ask me anything about editing; I'm here to help! * [[User:Wugapodes]]|Welcome! I edit Wikipedia because I like sharing knowledge with others, so if you have questions feel free to ask me. I'm excited to work together! * [[User:Nosebagbear]]|Hi there! I improve articles and help users like you - let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Trialpears]]|Hello! I edit in a lot of different areas where I see there are improvements to be made. I also enjoy helping new users navigate the confusing environment that is Wikipedia! * [[User:Ahmetlii]]|Welcome! I edit on different areas whenever there's a need of improvement, and try to help newcomers. Don't hesitate to ask questions about editing and other processes on Wikipedia, I will do my best to give a good answer. * [[User:Ipigott]]|I have experience of a wide variety of areas but am particularly keen on improving coverage of women. Please let me know how I can help you along. Happy editing! * [[User:Em-mustapha]]|Glad you are here and want to contribute to the sum of all human knowledge. How may I help you? * [[User:Bsoyka]]|Hey there! I contribute to many areas here on Wikipedia and I'm excited to help newcomers like you grow. Please let me know if you have any questions - I'm always happy to help and I look forward to meeting you! * [[User:Panini!]]|Hello! I'm Panini. Although I'm active in contributing to video game articles, I've learned the ropes and am here to answer your questions. If you have any, please ask! * [[User:Ampimd]]|Hello, I edit a wide variety of articles and topics, I hope I can lend a helping hand to you. Enjoy! * [[User:Tol]]|Welcome! I'm another Wikipedia editor, and am looking forward to get to know you. Ask me if you have any questions! * [[User:Pelagic]]|Hi, my interests include biology, old books, food, open data, photography, and of course Wikimedia ... but you can ask me anything! * [[User:Calliopejen1]]|Hi! I'm a longtime Wikipedia editor and love teaching others how to contribute. Let me know if you have any questions! * [[User:Berrely]]|Hi, I'm Berrely and I've been here for a while. I like editing topics related to England and video games, and I often make diagrams and graphics for articles. Feel free to ask any questions! * [[User:Bilorv]]|Hi! I'm happy to answer any questions you have, and none are too silly to ask. I was a newcomer once and I know how much new information there is at first, but I can help you find a place to start. * [[User:Elli]]|Hi! I'm a somewhat experienced editor happy to work with people interested in editing here. * [[User:Isabelle Belato]]|Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! My name is Isabelle and I'm glad to see you are interested in helping with the project. If you have any questions, feel free to ask! * [[User:DanCherek]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I like editing articles about literature and music, but feel free to ask me about anything — I'd love to help you get started. * [[User:ARoseWolf]]|Hello and welcome! My name is Asareel and I am here to assist you with navigating and editing Wikipedia. Please do not hesitate to ask me any questions you may have. * [[User:GenQuest]]|I can copyedit your new article(s) and creation(s) in such a way that you learn to avoid the pitfalls many new users face while beginning to edit here. * [[User:Michael D. Turnbull]]|I mainly contribute to science-related topics but I'll try to help you with other questions, including use of Wikimedia Commons for uploading images. * [[User:Eddie891]]|Hi! I'm Eddie891. I'm involved with a number of editing projects here. I like to go where my interest takes me and am happy to answer any questions you may have! * [[User:Pyrrho the Skeptic]]| Hi and welcome to Wikipedia! I have a wide variety of interests, and want to help editors have confidence and knowledge in their journey. Ask me literally anything, anytime! * [[User:Qwerfjkl]]|Hi, I'm Qwerfjkl! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:CaptainEek]]|Howdy hello! I'm CaptainEek and I sail the high seas of Wikipedia looking for users to help! Feel free to leave a message in a bottle for me, and welcome aboard matey. * [[User:Dreamy Jazz]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Dreamy Jazz, though please feel free to call me Jazz or DJ. If you want to ask me a question do leave a message and I'll get back to you soon. I live in the UTC timezone, so it may be a few hours before I reply. * [[User:lajmmoore]]| Hi there, lovely to meet you, and looking forward to supporting your edits! * [[User:Asartea]]|Hi there, and welcome to Wikipedia. Feel free to ask me any questions. * [[User:Ezlev]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I love helping to improve this free source of information, and I'm so glad you want to help too. Ask me anything and I'll do my best to help! * [[User:Pahunkat]]|Hello and welcome! I'm Pahunkat, an editor here on Wikipedia. Please feel free to ask me any questions you have, and I'll try my best to help! * [[User:Vukky]]|Hi, and welcome to Wikipedia! I'm Vukky, and I've been a Wikipedia editor for a few years. Let me know if you have any questions :) * [[User:EpicPupper]]|Hi, I'm EpicPupper! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:Zoozaz1]]|Hi, I'm Zoozaz1! I'd be happy to answer any questions about Wikipedia you might have. I'll try to reply within a day. * [[User:TheSandDoctor]]|Hi, I'm TheSandDoctor! I was as confused as you are now. But asking questions to experienced users helped me. Please feel free to ask me any question! * [[User:Pbsouthwood]]|I will help if I can, otherwise will try to point you to someone else who is more expert in whatever the problem may be. I am in UTC+2 time zone. My interests are mainly in science, technology and underwater diving. * [[User:SCHolar44]]|Hello! Thank you for joining our wonderful project. I'm a long-time editor and would be happy to make your journey easier and more rewarding. Let me know if I can help. I live in the UTC+10 time zone. Cheers, Simon. :-) * [[User:Sennecaster]]|Hello! I'm Sennecaster, but people call me Senne. Feel free to ask me questions and I will do my best to respond! I edit during the reasonable UTC-5 hours of the day. * [[User:Justiyaya]]|Hi, I'm Justiyaya! If you have any questions about Wikipedia, feel free to ask. * [[User:Chlod]]|Hiya! I'm Chlod, and I hope you enjoy your stay as a Wikipedia editor! Let me know if you have any questions or concerns, and I'll come running! * [[User:JavaHurricane]]|Hi there! Welcome to Wikipedia. I've been editing for a few years now, and will do my best to help you. * [[User:Rotideypoc41352]]|Hello and welcome! Please feel free to drop by my talk page, introduce yourself, and let me know what you led you to click that "Edit" button. * [[User:Extraordinary Writ]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! Do feel free to ask me any questions you might have about editing: I'd be glad to help. * [[User:Ganesha811]]|Hello and welcome to Wikipedia! I'm Ganesha811 - if you have any questions about Wikipedia and how to edit, just ask. * [[User:LEvalyn]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! I've been editing for a few years and having a lot of fun, I am happy to answer questions or help however I can! * [[User:I dream of horses]]|Hello! I'm I dream of horses, and have been editing for over a decade! Ask me anything about Wikipedia. * [[User:Blaze Wolf]]|Hello! I'm here to help new users in understanding and editing Wikipedia constructively. * [[User:ZI Jony]]|Hello, Welcome to Wikipedia! I've been editing for a few years. Do feel free to ask me any questions you might have about editing, I am happy to answer your questions or help you however I can! * [[User:Usedtobecool]]|Hello, and welcome to Wikipedia! I am Usedtobecool and I have some experience guiding new editors. Please feel free to reach out if you are having trouble getting started or run into any problems. Good luck! * [[User:Valereee]]|Hello and welcome! I love helping new editors figure out Wikipedia, so ask me anything! * [[User:AssumeGoodWraith]]|Hello. I will try to help. Maybe my advice will be useful sometimes. * [[User:FormalDude]]|I'm happy to help answer your questions! I edit Wikipedia daily and am quick at responding. * [[User:Nick Moyes]]|Hello! If you need any help or guidance as you get started here, just click the button below and ask me a question. I'm around most days. Cheers, Nick. * [[User:Cloud atlas]]|Hi! I've been editing Wikipedia for a few years, and I love to help new people get started. Feel free to ask questions! * [[User:Celestina007]]|Hello there, I’m delighted to guide and guard you throughout your Wikipedia career, Please do not hesitate to reach out to me. Happy editing! * [[User:Aerin17]]|Hello and welcome to Wikipedia! Feel free to ask me any questions you may have-- I'm always happy to help. * [[User:Gerald Waldo Luis]]|Hey, welcome! :) If you're a newcomer and you'd like to ask questions about editing, I'd be happy to help! Keep in mind my timezone is UTC+7, though I sometimes stay up. * [[User:David notMD]]|My advice likely most useful to people who want to contribute to articles in the medical/health/nutrition/alternative medicine arenas. * [[User:Zippybonzo]]|I am happy to help you with anything at all. If you have a question I will do my very best to answer it.

However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Growth/Tools/How_to_claim_a_mentee 'How To Claim A Mentee']. '''Where can I leave feedback?'''
You may leave comments about the Mentor list at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features/Mentor list]], or give broader feedback and suggestions at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features]]. Please note: if you are signed up on this list - expect to be assigned random new users as mentees. --------- * [[User:Sungodtemple]]|Welcome to Wikipedia! You can ask me questions about editing and other processes. I'll do my best to respond timely. * [[User:Sdkb]]|Hi, I'm Sdkb! I contribute to many different areas of Wikipedia where I see unmet needs, trying to improve the world's information ecosystem. {{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. If you would like to be available to help new users, please add your name and a brief welcome message at the bottom of the page. '''Who can become a mentor? '''
If you are sufficiently experienced to answer basic editing questions from new users, and enjoy helping people in a friendly and supportive manner, then you are an ideal person to be a Mentor. Thank you! You need to be [[WP:XC|Extended Confirmed]] to edit this list at the present time. (It is also expected that a significant proportion of your 500 minimum edits will have been made in Mainspace.) If you don't yet meet this key requirement, please gain a bit more experience before adding yourself. '''How do I sign up?'''
Mentors should sign up below with a short welcome message using the following formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please use only this syntax; DO NOT insert any links or wikitext in your welcome message or it may affect how all the messages appear. Please limit it to 240 characters Avoid mentioning your own subject interests in your welcome message, as you will available as a mentor to many different types of new users. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. '''What happens next?'''
Once you have signed up here, you will start to be randomly assigned users as 'mentees'. Their names will begin to appear in your new [[Special:MentorDashboard|'Mentor dashboard']]. You can reach it via a new link at the top of every page. Each new user (mentee) assigned to you will see ''your'' welcome message in a 'Your mentor' box on ''their'' own 'Homepage' tab. You '''do not''' need to proactively welcome your mentees! - your invitation message simply invites ''them'' to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help. Their post on your talk page will automatically begin "''Question from [username]''" and is tagged as a 'Mentorship module edit'. (For further information see this [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/FAQ#mentoring Mediawiki FAQ]) '''Will I be swamped with questions?'''
This is unlikely to happen. Whilst you'll certainly see your Dashboard filling up with newly assigned usernames, by far the majority will make one edit or less. Of the remainder, most will be OK as they are. Of those needing help, some will find their way to the [[WP:TH|Teahouse]] or get solutions elsewhere. Only a small number will seek your help as a mentor, and we hope you will be there for them when they do. Hint: set your Dashboard filter to only display users who've made ''one edit or more'' in the last ''day'' or ''week'', and you will drastically reduce that list. For a list of every question asked of all mentors over the last 14 days, [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&tagfilter=mentorship+module+question&limit=100&days=14&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 Click Here]. '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?'''
In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Growth/Tools/How_to_claim_a_mentee 'How To Claim A Mentee']. '''Where can I leave feedback?'''
You may leave comments about the Mentor list at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features/Mentor list]], or give broader feedback and suggestions at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features]]. {{pp-30-500|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef}} This is the list of mentors for the [[Wikipedia:Growth Team features|Growth Team features]]. If you would like to be available to help new users, please add your name and a brief welcome message at the bottom of the page. '''Who can become a mentor? '''
If you are sufficiently experienced to answer basic editing questions from new users, and enjoy helping people in a friendly and supportive manner, then you are an ideal person to be a Mentor. Thank you! You need to be [[WP:XC|Extended Confirmed]] to edit this list at the present time. (It is also expected that a significant proportion of your 500 minimum edits will have been made in Mainspace.) If you don't yet meet this key requirement, please gain a bit more experience before adding yourself. '''How do I sign up?'''
Mentors should sign up below with a short welcome message using the following formatting: [[User:Name]]|Description. Please use only this syntax; DO NOT insert any links or wikitext in your welcome message or it may affect how all the messages appear. Please limit it to 240 characters Avoid mentioning your own subject interests in your welcome message, as you will available as a mentor to many different types of new users. Full instructions are at [[mw:Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor|Growth/Communities/How to introduce yourself as a mentor]]. '''What happens next?'''
Once you have signed up here, you will start to be randomly assigned users as 'mentees'. Their names will begin to appear in your new [[Special:MentorDashboard|'Mentor dashboard']]. You can reach it via a new link at the top of every page. Each new user (mentee) assigned to you will see ''your'' welcome message in a 'Your mentor' box on ''their'' own 'Homepage' tab. You '''do not''' need to proactively welcome your mentees! - your invitation message simply invites ''them'' to ask ''you'' questions should they ever encounter difficulties and need help. Their post on your talk page will automatically begin "''Question from [username]''" and is tagged as a 'Mentorship module edit'. (For further information see this [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/FAQ#mentoring Mediawiki FAQ]) '''Will I be swamped with questions?'''
This is unlikely to happen. Whilst you'll certainly see your Dashboard filling up with newly assigned usernames, by far the majority will make one edit or less. Of the remainder, most will be OK as they are. Of those needing help, some will find their way to the [[WP:TH|Teahouse]] or get solutions elsewhere. Only a small number will seek your help as a mentor, and we hope you will be there for them when they do. Hint: set your Dashboard filter to only display users who've made ''one edit or more'' in the last ''day'' or ''week'', and you will drastically reduce that list. For a list of every question asked of all mentors over the last 14 days, [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?hidebots=1&hidecategorization=1&hideWikibase=1&tagfilter=mentorship+module+question&limit=100&days=14&title=Special:RecentChanges&urlversion=2 Click Here]. '''Can I choose who I want to be a mentor to?'''
In general, no. However, if you only want to act as mentor to a few ''specific'' users (e.g. course participants/editathon attendees), add your name instead to [[WP:Growth Team features/Mentor list/Manual|this alternative list]] (but NOT to both!). Then follow [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Growth/Tools/How_to_claim_a_mentee 'How To Claim A Mentee']. '''Where can I leave feedback?'''
You may leave comments about the Mentor list at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features/Mentor list]], or give broader feedback and suggestions at [[Wikipedia talk:Growth Team features]].
